title: Workspace
intro: Configure your WhatsApp profile, workspace, and view basic reports.
waPhotoDesc: WhatsApp Business profile image (shown in chat).
waPhotoHintConnect: Connect ACCESS_TOKEN to see the current photo from Meta.
waPhotoHintChange: To change the WhatsApp photo use Meta Business Manager or the WhatsApp Business app. You see it here in real time.
portalPhotoDesc: Workspace avatar in this panel (does not change WhatsApp profile automatically).
displayNameHint: The display name appears in the portal title and green dot menu.

ops.noRedis: No Redis: chats and campaigns may be lost between Vercel restarts. Connect Upstash/KV.
ops.noCronSecret: No CRON_SECRET: external cron cannot process campaigns. Campaigns advance while the dashboard is open with a session.
ops.cronExternalHint: CRON_SECRET is set. On Vercel Hobby use an external cron (every 5 min) to POST /api/campaigns/cron/tick with Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET, or keep the dashboard open.
ops.noDashboardAuth: No DASHBOARD_PASSWORD: the dashboard is open without login.
ops.noIntegrationKey: No INTEGRATION_API_KEY: the CRM/ERP integration API is blocked in production.

languageHint: Choose the interface language. Does not affect WhatsApp template languages sent to Meta.
languageNote: Saved to your workspace and this browser.
reportsIntro: Operational summary. Export CSV or open billing for more detail.
